name: 配对与家庭内部复杂性
description: 用于从个人层面转向夫妻、亲子 dyad、多子女家庭内部差异和关系多维性的表达。

clusters.meaning: 夫妻或家庭成员的 linked/paired trajectory 写法

expressions.note: 强调两个事件不可分割地共同发生，比 related to 更有过程感。
expressions.example: Dissolution intertwined with parenthood may intensify distress.

expressions.note: 比 mixed 更学术，适合亲子、夫妻或制度态度的复杂关系。
expressions.example: Ambivalent ties can generate stress and uncertainty.

expressions.note: 适合多关系场景，说明某一个极端 dyad 可能决定整体后果。
expressions.example: The threshold strategy compares closest and most distant ties.

expressions.note: linked 强调两个人的路径在同一关系中共同演化。
expressions.example: The study examines couples' linked occupational trajectories.

expressions.note: paired 比 individual 更明确，适合强调 couple-level unit。
expressions.example: The typology captures paired occupational trajectories.

expressions.note: 不是单个 dyad 的矛盾，而是家庭内部多段关系的聚合复杂性。
expressions.example: Collective ambivalence varies across adult children.

clusters.meaning: 多子女家庭内部差异和 closest/most distant dyad

expressions.note: 强调家庭不是同质单位，适合多子女和兄弟姐妹研究。
用于解释为什么单一指标不足，适合方法和理论段。
expressions.example: The typology retains multi-dimensional and ambivalent natures.

expressions.note: 与 emotional affinity 区分，用于指出亲密增加的具体来源。
expressions.example: Greater intimacy was driven by functional exchanges.

expressions.note: 比 closeness 更精确，适合与 functional exchange、contact frequency 并列。
expressions.example: The change reflected exchange rather than emotional affinity.

expressions.note: 用于区分联系频率与情感质量，不宜泛化为所有关系好坏。
expressions.example: Associational connections increased after health declines.

expressions.en: Compare closest and most distant relationship dyads.
expressions.note: 适合多关系家庭，不把家庭视为一个平均关系。
expressions.example: We compare the closest and most distant dyads.

clusters.meaning: 多维、矛盾和疏离/紧密关系类型

expressions.en: Distinguish functional exchanges from emotional affinity.
expressions.note: 能防止把关系改善说得过宽，适合多维关系结果。
expressions.example: We distinguish support exchanges from emotional affinity.

expressions.note: 比 distant 更强，通常暗示接触、支持和情感都较弱。
expressions.example: Alienated ties predicted lower cognitive functioning.

expressions.note: 强调多维度的紧密联系，不只是 emotional closeness。
expressions.example: Tight-knit ties were linked to slower decline.

expressions.note: 比 distant 带有关系破裂或长期疏离色彩。
expressions.example: The more estranged the tie is, the lower wellbeing becomes.

expressions.en: Treat couples, rather than individuals, as the unit of analysis.
expressions.note: 用于说明为何需要 dyadic data 或 couple-level typology。
expressions.example: We treat couples as the unit of analysis.

expressions.en: Model closest, most distant, and variation as complementary measures.
expressions.note: 避免平均化家庭关系，突出多子女家庭复杂性。
expressions.example: We model closest ties, most distant ties, and variation.
